title: event.bookingAvailability
description: Indicates whether the event still has tickets or reservations available. Exactly one of type or remainingCapacity must be provided (mutually exclusive). An optional capacity may also be included.

type.description:
One of two possible types.

- `Available`: Tickets or reservations available
- `Unavailable`: No more tickets or reservations available.

capacity.description: Total number of seats or tickets.

remainingCapacity.description: Number of remaining seats or tickets.
